narrative_beat: Close extremo de calendario antigo, dia 23 de setembro circulado em vermelho sangue

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: an extreme macro of an old paper wall calendar with the 23rd of September circled in blood red
subject.focal_point: the blood-red circle around the number 23 written with a trembling hand
subject.secondary: Vintage grayscale calendar page with September layout, the 23 encircled in thick crimson ink, fountain pen laying beside.

composition.foreground: the red circle in vivid crimson ink

lighting.key_light: candlelight from lower-left casting raking shadow
lighting.rim_light: warm amber rim around ink circle

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.secondary: the date that would not come

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

in_scene_text.placement: center of frame, circled in red

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.

narration_excerpt: Vinte e tres de setembro de dois mil e vinte e cinco. O dia do arrebatamento da Igreja.
